context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the ElevenLabs WebSocket streaming protocol, including proper initialization messages, model selection constraints, flush behavior, keepalive handling, and stream closure.

checklist.name: WebSocket URL format
checklist.description: Connects to wss://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voiceId}/stream-input with model_id as a query parameter

checklist.name: No eleven_v3 for WebSocket
checklist.description: Does NOT use eleven_v3 as the model for WebSocket streaming (uses eleven_flash_v2_5, eleven_flash_v2, or eleven_turbo_v2_5 instead)

checklist.name: Flash model for streaming
checklist.description: Uses eleven_flash_v2_5 or eleven_flash_v2 model for low-latency streaming

checklist.name: Init message has space text
checklist.description: First WebSocket message includes 'text' field set to a single space ' '

checklist.name: Init message has voice_settings
checklist.description: First WebSocket message includes voice_settings with at least stability and similarity_boost

checklist.name: Init message has chunk_length_schedule
checklist.description: First WebSocket message includes generation_config with chunk_length_schedule array

checklist.name: Init message has API key
checklist.description: First WebSocket message includes xi_api_key field (sourced from ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable)

checklist.name: Flush at turn end
checklist.description: Sends a message with flush:true at the end of a conversation turn to force buffered audio to be generated

checklist.name: Close with empty text
checklist.description: Closes the stream by sending a message with empty text string (e.g., {"text": ""})

checklist.name: Keepalive mechanism
checklist.description: Implements a keepalive by sending a space ' ' during inactivity periods to prevent the 20-second timeout

checklist.name: Audio base64 decoding
checklist.description: Decodes received audio chunks from base64 (data['audio'] is base64-encoded)

checklist.name: Check isFinal
checklist.description: Checks for isFinal field in received messages to know when the stream is complete
